content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:CelebrationIV.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[May 24]]–[[May 28|28]] - [[Celebration IV]] held in Los Angeles, California.]]
A list of events in '''2007''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[George Lucas]] was Grand Marshall in the 2007 [[Wikipedia:Tournament of Roses Parade|Tournament of Roses Parade]].
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Legacy (2006) 7|''Legacy'' (2006) 7]] released.
*10 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 12|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 12]] released.
*10 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7]]'' released.
*[[January 12|12]] – ''[[What's The Story?]]'' [http://www.starwars.com/databank/updates/news20070112.html Episode I (Round 8)] published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[January 15|15]] – ''[[You Can Draw: Star Wars]]'' published.
*[[January 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Seven: The Wrong Side of the War]]'' published.
*[[January 24|24]] – [[Dark Times 2|''Dark Times'' 2]] released.
*[[January 30|30]] – [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] released.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]] released.

==February==
*[[February 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Volume 1: My Brother, My Enemy]]'' released.
*14 – [[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]] released.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[Wookieepedia:Star Wars Merchandise Wiki]] founded.
*19 – [[Star Wars Insider 92|''Star Wars Insider'' 92]] published.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Heir to the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Heir to the Empire'' audiobook]] published on digital platform.
*[[February 27|27]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' released.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 14|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 14]] released.

==March==
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Legacy (2006) 9|''Legacy'' (2006) 9]] released.
*[[March 12|12]] – [[Cailey Fleming]] is born.
*[[March 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1: The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]'' released.
*[[March 25|25]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Man with a Mission]]'' released.
*[[March 28|28]] – [[Legacy (2006) 10|''Legacy'' (2006) 10]] released.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' published.
*[[April 4|04]] – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 2: Jedi vs. Sith]]'' published.
*[[April 11|11]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]
*[[April 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]'' released.
*[[April 24|24]] – ''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]'' released.
*24 – [[Star Wars Insider 93|''Star Wars Insider'' 93]] published.
*[[April 28|28]] – [[Ronnie Phillips]] dies.
*? – [[Zynga]] is founded.

==May==
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] released.
*[[May 5|05]] – [[Free Comic Book Day]]
*[[May 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 1: Broken]]'' released.
*09 – [[Legacy (2006) 11|''Legacy'' (2006) 11]] released.
*09 – [[Dark Times 3|''Dark Times'' 3]] released.
*[[May 10|10]] – [[Chuck Riley]] dies.
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]] released.
*16 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 2: Flashpoint]]'' released.
*[[May 23|23]] – [[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]] released.
*[[May 24|24]] – [[May 28|28]] - [[Celebration IV]] held in Los Angeles, California.
*25 – ''[[Star Wars at 30]]'' aired.
*[[May 28|28]] – ''[[Star Wars Tech]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: The Legacy Revealed]]'' air on [[Wikipedia:History (TV channel)|The History Channel]].
*[[May 29|29]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' released.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]] released.
*[[May 31|31]] – [[Star Wars Insider 94|''Star Wars Insider'' 94]] published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]]-[[June 3|03]] – The eighth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]].
*[[June 5|05]] – [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|''Star Wars Role Playing Game Saga Edition'']] released.
*[[June 8|08]]-[[June 10|10]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] released.
*13 – [[Rebellion 7|''Rebellion'' 7]] released.
*[[June 15|15]]-[[June 17|17]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*17 – ''[[Robot Chicken: Star Wars]]'' aired.
*[[June 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG: Base Set]]'' released.
*[[June 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8]]'' published.
*[[June 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[June 22|22]]-[[June 24|24]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.

==July==
*[[July 11|11]] – [[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] released.
*11 – [[Rebellion 8|''Rebellion'' 8]] released.
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Celebration Europe (2007)|Celebration Europe]] held in London, United Kingdom.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] released.
*[[July 24|24]] – [[Star Wars Insider 95|''Star Wars Insider'' 95]] published.
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]] released.

==August==
*[[August 8|08]] – [[Legacy (2006) 15|''Legacy'' (2006) 15]] released.
*08 – [[Rebellion 9|''Rebellion'' 9]] released.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 19|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 19]] published.
*[[August 27|27]] – [[Ariana Greenblatt]] is born.
*27 – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 6: Endgame]]'' released.
*[[August 28|28]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' released.
*[[August 29|29]] – [[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]] shipped to subscribers.

==September==
*[[September 4|04]] – [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]] published.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]] released.
*12 – [[Rebellion 10|''Rebellion'' 10]] released.
*[[September 18|18]] – [[Christine Hewett]] dies.
*[[September 20|20]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 20|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 20]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Boxed Set: Episodes I–VI]]'' published.
*[[October 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' released.
*[[October 10|10]] – [[Dark Times 5|''Dark Times'' 5]] released.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[Larry Ward]] dies.
*[[October 16|16]] – ''[[Death Star (novel)]]'' released.
*[[October 17|17]] – [[Dark Times 6|''Dark Times'' 6]] released.
*[[October 23|23]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 9]]'' published.
*23 – [[Star Wars Insider 97|''Star Wars Insider'' 97]] published.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 21|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 21]] published.
*24 – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 9: Boba Fett: Death, Lies, and Treachery]]'' published.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[October 28|28]] [[Star Wars Reunion II]], held in Paris, France.
*[[October 29|29]] – [[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Attack of the Clones'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[October 30|30]] – ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' released.
*[[October 31|31]] – [[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] released.
*31 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi, Volume 1]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – Chapter 7 went live in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
*01 – [[Production IG]] founded.
*[[November 6|06]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' released
*[[November 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]'' published.
*07 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 22|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 22]] published.
*07 – [[Aliens in the Empire|Aliens in the Empire Part 1]] published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Temirlan Blaev]] is born.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[November 27|27]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' released.
*27 – [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] released.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 23|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 23]] published.
*[[November 29|29]] – ''[[The Traitor's Gambit]]'' first adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.

==December==
*[[December 4|04]] – ''[[Aliens in the Empire]]'' Part 2 online supplement published.
*[[December 18|18]] – [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] released.
*[[December 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 10]]'' released.
*19 – [[Dark Times 7|''Dark Times'' 7]] released.
*[[December 20|20]] – [[A Wretched Hive (Dawn of Defiance)|''A Wretched Hive'']] second adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[December 26|26]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' released.
*26 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 24|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 24]] released.

==Unknown==
*[[Louie Lunt Davies]] is born.

----
{{Years-RealWorld}}

==External links==
